nasb.text: Every man of Judah and Jerusalem returned with Jehoshaphat at their head, returning to Jerusalem with joy, for the Lord had made them to rejoice over their enemies.

esv.text: Then they returned, every man of Judah and Jerusalem, and Jehoshaphat at their head, returning to Jerusalem with joy, for the Lord had made them rejoice over their enemies.

cnv.text: 事後，猶大和耶路撒冷所有的人，在約沙法率領下，都歡歡喜喜回耶路撒冷去了，耶和華使他們因勝過仇敵歡喜快樂。

ccb.text: 犹大人和耶路撒冷人在约沙法的带领下，欢欢喜喜地返回耶路撒冷，因为耶和华使他们战胜了仇敌。
